sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id INTEGER, value INTEGER);
UPDATE test_bitwise SET value = xor(value, 3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, xor(value, 2) AS modified_value FROM test_bitwise;
SELECT xor(t1.value, t2.value) AS xor_result FROM test_bitwise t1, test_bitwise t2 WHERE t1.id != t2.id;
